description: Evaluate seasonal drought risks for Panama Canal operations using the briefing at ~/Desktop/canal_assessment_brief.txt and NCEP precipitation data (~/PanoplyData/prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc) in NASA Panoply. Generate a 1D time-series line plot of precipitation at the canal's coordinates (9N, 80W) and export it to ~/Documents/CanalAssessment/annual_precip_profile.png. Create geo-mapped spatial plots zoomed on Central America for the peak dry month and peak wet month, exporting them to ~/Documents/CanalAssessment/panama_precip_march.png and ~/Documents/CanalAssessment/panama_precip_october.png. Create a report at ~/Documents/CanalAssessment/draft_restriction_report.txt identifying the critical months and associated risks.
